name: security-compliance
description: Security and compliance operations. Bundles Vanta (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA GRC), KnowBe4 (security awareness), ThreatLocker (zero-trust endpoint), and Blumira (SIEM and detection), alongside core audit-readiness, evidence-gap, risk-heatmap, and approval-triage skills.

interface.shortDescription: Security and compliance operations across Vanta, KnowBe4, ThreatLocker, and Blumira.
